warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
10 Strict Press

hypertrophy.reasoning: Cleans tax lower body and anterior chain heavily; accessory work targets opposing/non-competing upper body musculature.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Clean Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean, 3 by 5. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, triceps, rear deltoids.
